cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16th birthday. I need to figure out the date one year ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so I need to work through the problem step by step. First, let's clarify the key information. Jane was born on the last day of February 2001.
